title: Titan Series Premium Double-Braced Vinyl Padded Metal Folding Chair - Black
features: The Titan Series Vinyl Padded Double Braced Metal Folding Chair combines comfort, durability, and efficiency, making it a top choice for businesses that need reliable seating solutions.
Built with a heavy-duty steel frame and reinforced with a double bracing system, this metal seating options chair delivers exceptional strength while remaining lightweight and easy to handle.
The padded vinyl seat and back provide a comfortable sitting experience, and the smooth surface is easy to clean—perfect for quick turnovers at events, conferences, and large gatherings.
Its foldable design allows for fast setup and compact storage, making it ideal for rental companies, venues, schools, and institutions.
With its professional look and long-lasting construction, this steel folding chair is a smart investment for any high-use commercial setting.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
